protocols.Study Title: BEACON-3: PD-L1 Inhibitor in Advanced NSCLC
protocols.Title: BEACON-3: PD-L1 Inhibitor in Advanced NSCLC
protocols.Objective: To evaluate the efficacy and safety of the investigational intervention in the target population
protocols.Inclusion Criteria: Adults 18-80 years; confirmed diagnosis; adequate organ function; written informed consent
protocols.Exclusion Criteria: Active malignancy (except study indication); uncontrolled infection; pregnancy or lactation; prior treatment with study drug class
protocols.Secondary Endpoints: Overall survival; safety profile; quality of life (QoL); pharmacokinetic parameters

protocols.Title: CardioShield: Novel Anticoagulant for AF
protocols.Objective: To evaluate the efficacy and safety of the investigational intervention in the target population
protocols.Inclusion Criteria: Adults 18-80 years; confirmed diagnosis; adequate organ function; written informed consent
protocols.Exclusion Criteria: Active malignancy (except study indication); uncontrolled infection; pregnancy or lactation; prior treatment with study drug class
protocols.Primary Endpoint: Major adverse cardiac events at 6 months
protocols.Secondary Endpoints: Overall survival; safety profile; quality of life (QoL); pharmacokinetic parameters
